source_intent.raw_intent: Case 004: I am a law_firm_operator in European Union. Build a srx_ace_build_agent for finance_ops using the compliance_lens. Chaos input type is overbroad_one_pass_lock. The source is intentionally messy: mix missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Produce a governed artifact with explicit validation gates. Return something SR8 can compile into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

parsed_tester_json.compiled_intent: Objective: Build an SRX ACE build agent for finance operations within a European Union law firm, using the compliance lens to ensure regulatory adherence and audit readiness. Scope: - The agent shall generate, validate, and deploy finance operation workflows, contracts, and reports that comply with EU financial regulations (e.g., MiFID II, GDPR, AML directives). It must handle overbroad one-pass lock inputs by enforcing strict validation gates and rejecting ambiguous or incomplete data. Constraints: - All outputs must be GDPR-compliant and respect data minimization. - No execution of financial transactions without explicit human approval. - Must log all validation failures and blocked actions for audit trails. - Must operate within the law firm's existing IT infrastructure and Codex runtime. - Must not expose client confidential data beyond encrypted storage. Success Criteria: - Agent successfully parses and validates at least 95% of finance ops requests against compliance rules. - All validation gates produce explicit pass/fail evidence with timestamps. - Generated artifacts (contracts, reports) pass a mock regulatory audit checklist. - Overbroad one-pass lock inputs are rejected with clear reason codes. - System produces a final compliance evidence report for each processed case. Output Contract: - format: JSON - fields: name: artifact_id; type: string; description: Unique identifier for the generated artifact; name: validation_gates; type: array; items: type: object; properties: gate_name: string; status: string; evidence: string; timestamp: string; name: compliance_report; type: object; properties: regulation: string; status: string; details: string; name: blocked_reason; type: string; nullable: True; name: final_report; type: object; properties: summary: string; recommendations: array - required: artifact_id; validation_gates; compliance_report; final_report
